metadata.name: wattz_marketplace
metadata.description: Wattz Solana AI Inference Marketplace -- settlement, dispute, staking, slashing, node/model registry

instructions.name: claim_reward
docs: Claim the accumulated uptime reward pool for a node.

instructions.name: increase_stake
docs: Top up an existing stake (or create it) and extend the lock.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: One-shot initializer: creates the `Config` PDA and the program vault ATA.

accounts.name: mint
docs: $WATTZ SPL mint.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Vault associated-token account, created here.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury token account -- must already exist and hold `mint`.

instructions.name: open_dispute
docs: Open a dispute against a receipt during the dispute window.

instructions.name: register_model
docs: Publish a model + licence + price in the on-chain registry.

instructions.name: register_node
docs: Register a GPU node and lock the initial stake (>= `config.min_node_stake`).

instructions.name: resolve_dispute
docs: Admin records dispute outcome, applying reputation + flag effects.

instructions.name: settle_inference
docs: After dispute window, distribute price and burn the project fee share.

accounts.name: settler
docs: Anyone may crank the settle once the dispute window has elapsed.

instructions.name: slash_node
docs: Admin slashes the stake of a node whose reputation dropped below the
slashing threshold.

instructions.name: submit_inference
docs: Gateway records a completed inference receipt and funds the vault.

instructions.name: unstake
docs: Withdraw staked tokens once the lock has expired.

errors.name: InsufficientStake
errors.msg: Provided stake is below the configured minimum

errors.name: ModelNotRegistered
errors.msg: The referenced model account is not registered

errors.name: InvalidAttestation
errors.msg: TEE attestation hash is empty or malformed

errors.name: NodeSlashed
errors.msg: Node has been slashed and cannot serve inferences

errors.name: DisputeAlreadyOpen
errors.msg: A dispute is already open on this receipt

errors.name: DisputeWindowElapsed
errors.msg: Dispute window has elapsed; disputes are no longer accepted

errors.name: DisputeWindowActive
errors.msg: Dispute window is still active; settlement is blocked

errors.name: ReceiptAlreadySettled
errors.msg: Receipt has already been settled

errors.name: ReceiptDisputed
errors.msg: Receipt is disputed; wait for resolution before settling

errors.name: LicenseViolation
errors.msg: Model license requires additional off-chain verification

errors.name: KycRequired
errors.msg: KYC gating enabled; requester attestation missing

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: String field exceeds its maximum length

errors.name: StakeLocked
errors.msg: Stake is still within its lock period

errors.name: InsufficientStakedAmount
errors.msg: Requested amount exceeds staked balance

errors.name: ReputationAboveSlashingThreshold
errors.msg: Node reputation is above the slashing threshold

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Caller is not authorized for this instruction

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: DisputeNotResolved
errors.msg: Dispute is not in a resolvable state

errors.name: InvalidResolution
errors.msg: Invalid dispute resolution passed

errors.name: NoPendingRewards
errors.msg: Node has no pending rewards to claim

errors.name: InvalidNodeAuthority
errors.msg: Node account does not belong to the provided authority

errors.name: ModelListFull
errors.msg: Model support list is full

errors.name: ModelMismatch
errors.msg: Provided model account does not match receipt

errors.name: NodeMismatch
errors.msg: Provided node account does not match receipt

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Provided price cannot be zero

types.name: Config
docs: Singleton configuration PDA.
Seeds: `[b"config"]`
Stores the admin (governance) key, the trusted inference gateway key that
is allowed to submit receipts, the settlement mint, the treasury token
account, and economic parameters that can be tuned at deploy time.

fields.name: admin
docs: Governance authority. May resolve disputes and slash nodes.

fields.name: gateway
docs: Trusted inference gateway. Only this key may submit receipts.

fields.name: mint
docs: $WATTZ SPL mint used for settlement, staking and rewards.

fields.name: treasury
docs: SPL token account that receives the non-burned share of the project fee.

fields.name: min_node_stake
docs: Minimum stake required to register a GPU node.

fields.name: dispute_window_secs
docs: Grace period during which requesters may open a dispute.

fields.name: vault_authority_bump
docs: PDA bump for the vault authority (owner of the program vault ATA).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this Config account.

types.name: DisputeAccount
docs: Dispute PDA.
Seeds: `[b"dispute", receipt.key().as_ref()]`
One dispute per receipt. `evidence_hash` points to an off-chain packet
(mismatched TEE quote, tampered response transcript, ...).

fields.name: receipt
docs: The receipt being disputed.

fields.name: opener
docs: Wallet that opened the dispute.

fields.name: reason_code
docs: Free-form reason bucket (0 = attestation-mismatch, 1 = quality, ...).

fields.name: evidence_hash
docs: Hash of the off-chain evidence bundle.

fields.name: resolved
docs: Set true once the admin has recorded a resolution.

fields.name: resolution
docs: Final resolution.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: InferenceReceipt
docs: Inference receipt PDA.
Seeds: `[b"receipt", request_id.as_ref()]`
`request_id` is a 32-byte identifier produced by the gateway (typically the
blake3 hash of `{prompt, model, timestamp, requester}`). Storing prompt and
response as opaque hashes keeps the on-chain footprint small while allowing
any observer to reconstruct proofs off-chain against a signed transcript.

fields.name: request_id
docs: Unique 32-byte request identifier.

fields.name: node
docs: PDA of the serving node.

fields.name: model
docs: PDA of the model that produced the output.

fields.name: requester
docs: End-user requester wallet.

fields.name: prompt_hash
docs: Blake3 / sha256 hash of the input prompt.

fields.name: response_hash
docs: Blake3 / sha256 hash of the streamed response.

fields.name: tokens
docs: Number of output tokens billed.

fields.name: price
docs: Total price paid, denominated in $WATTZ base units.

fields.name: tee_attestation_hash
docs: Hash of the TEE attestation (Intel SGX / AMD SEV-SNP / NVIDIA CC).

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp at which the receipt was created.

fields.name: settled
docs: Set true after `settle_inference` executes.

fields.name: disputed
docs: Set true when a dispute is open against this receipt.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: License
docs: Software licence classification.
Kept as unit variants -- serialised as a single byte discriminator.
Additional licences can be introduced without breaking existing accounts by
remapping the `Custom` variant.

types.name: ModelAccount
docs: Model registry PDA.
Seeds: `[b"model", publisher.key().as_ref(), name.as_bytes(), version.as_bytes()]`
One PDA per (publisher, name, version) triple. `ipfs_hash` is a CID pointer
to weights / manifest hosted off-chain (IPFS / Arweave / R2).

fields.name: publisher
docs: Wallet that published (and can update pricing for) this model.

fields.name: name
docs: Canonical model name, e.g. `llama-3-8b-instruct`.

fields.name: version
docs: Semver-ish version tag, e.g. `1.0.0`, `q4_k_m`.

fields.name: license
docs: Licence bucket.

fields.name: ipfs_hash
docs: Content-addressed pointer to weights / manifest.

fields.name: price_per_1k_tokens
docs: Price charged per 1k output tokens, denominated in $WATTZ base units.

fields.name: kyc_gated
docs: True when the model requires KYC-verified requesters.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: NodeAccount
docs: GPU node account.
Seeds: `[b"node", authority.key().as_ref()]`
One `NodeAccount` per unique operator authority. Reputation is a signed
running score updated on settle / dispute resolution / uptime heartbeats.

fields.name: authority
docs: Wallet that owns and operates the node.

fields.name: gpu_model
docs: Free-form GPU model tag, e.g. `RTX 4090`, `H100 80GB`.

fields.name: region
docs: ISO-3166 alpha-2 region code, e.g. `US`, `KR`, `EU-DE`.

fields.name: endpoint
docs: HTTPS endpoint the routing engine hits for inference requests.

fields.name: stake_amount
docs: Total tokens currently locked as stake by this node.

fields.name: reputation
docs: Running reputation score. Bounded on both sides.

fields.name: uptime_last_ping
docs: Unix timestamp of the last successful settle or heartbeat.

fields.name: models_supported
docs: Models this node has advertised support for.

fields.name: pending_rewards
docs: Accumulated uptime reward pool, claimable via `claim_reward`.

fields.name: slashed
docs: Set true once the node has been slashed. Prevents further receipts.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: Resolution
docs: Dispute resolution outcome.

types.name: StakeAccount
docs: Stake PDA.
Seeds: `[b"stake", staker.key().as_ref()]`
Tracks staked amount and lock expiry per unique staker. The tokens
themselves live in the program vault ATA; this account is metadata only.

fields.name: staker
docs: Wallet that owns this stake.

fields.name: amount
docs: Currently staked amount in $WATTZ base units.

fields.name: lock_until
docs: Unix timestamp after which `unstake` is permitted.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.
